nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Rain and snow showers. Cloudy. Low around 28, with temperatures rising to around 31 overnight. East northeast wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New snow accumulation of 2 to 4 inches possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Snow showers likely before 8am, then a chance of snow showers and a slight chance of freezing rain between 8am and 1pm, then a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 39. East wind 13 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New snow accumulation of 2 to 4 inches possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy. Low around 39, with temperatures rising to around 47 overnight. Southeast wind 16 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Mostly sunny, with a high near 67. Southwest wind 14 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 35 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. North northeast wind 5 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 60. Northeast wind 6 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 39. Northeast wind around 10 mph.

nws.name: Friday

nws.name: Saturday Night

nws.name: Monday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 1pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 77. Southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.
